prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen3 (CJXB/CJXC)** 2.0L TSI engine, targeting 350 HP and 369 lb-ft on 93 octane with a **Garrett GT2867R .82 A/R turbocharger**, **APR High-Flow Carbon Fiber Intake System**, and **APR Cast-Downpipe with 3.5" diameter** for optimized spool and reduced backpressure

HGP **Big Turbo Kit** for the **CJXB/CJXC** platform, featuring a **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA (62mm, 0.82 A/R) turbo**, **HGP 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust**, **HGP 750cc high-impedance injectors**, and **HGP upgraded in-tank fuel pump (380 LPH)** for sustained 450 HP on E85

KW Suspensions **Clubsport 3-Way Adjustable Coilovers** with **KW-specific valving for the MQB platform**, **polyurethane top mounts**, and **camber-adjustable front control arms (034 Motorsport)** for aggressive track alignment (-3.5° front, -2.8° rear), paired with **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars**
estetica: **Rieger Tuning Clubsport-specific widebody kit** (front/rear fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) in **PPG Porsche GT3 RS Lime Gold**, with **custom 3M Matte Black roof wrap** and **Rieger carbon fiber front splitter (MQB-specific)**

**Oettinger Golf 7R Clubsport rear wing** (carbon fiber, 150mm height) mounted on **Oettinger aluminum wing risers**, paired with **VMR V710 19x9.5 ET35 wheels** in **Gloss Bronze** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19)**

**APR Carbon Fiber Engine Cover** (red weave) with **custom laser-engraved "EA888 Gen3" script**, **034 Motorsport billet aluminum oil cap**, and **Forge Motorsport silicone coolant hoses (red)** for engine bay contrast
